src_embedding_text: source: design test case id: tc-authentication-001 title: successful user registration with valid credentials module: user registration source files or pages: 3 covered methods: preconditions: - firebase/firestore is accessible. - no existing user with the provided email. test data: - email: `test.user@example.com` - password: `securepass123!` - username: `testuser` test steps: 1. user enters registration data (email, password, username) via ui. 2. ui sends `creaaccount(email, password)` to firebase/authentication. 3. firebase/authentication validates data (format, uniqueness). 4. firestore confirms data validity and returns a token. 5. ui saves user data (`nome`, `email`, `token`) to the system. 6. ui displays confirmation: *"registration successful!"* expected result: - user account created in firestore with `id`, `username`, `email`, and `password` (hashed). - token returned to ui for future authentication. - no error messages displayed. unit: project:
